title: [MTR] Manila LRT-1
description: This resource pack adds various signs and JCM Pids
body:
# [MTR] Manila LRT-1
# EN
## Mabuhay!
This resource pack adds various signs and JCM Pids

This pack requires [Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) and [JCM](https://modrinth.com/mod/jcm)

### Contents
- Exit Signs (1-10)
- Joban Pids (Both EN and FIL)

# FIL
## Mabuhay!
Ang _resource pack_ na ito ay nagdaragdag ng iba't ibang sign at _JCM Pids_ base sa bagong extension ng LRT-1

Ito ay _required_ ng [Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) at ng [JCM](https://modrinth.com/mod/jcm)

### Mga _Content_
- Exit Signs (1-10)
- Joban Pids (EN and FIL)

<details>
<summary> </summary>

Sorry lang kung hindi nyo mabasa di ako masyado nag sasalita ng filipino eh...

</details>

# 中国 
## Mabuhay!

此资源包添加了各种标志和 _JCM PIDS_

这依赖于 [MTR](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) 和 [JCM](https://modrinth.com/mod/jcm)

### 内容
- Exit Signs (1-10)
- Joban Pids (EN 和 FIL)
